mossy_lantern.name: The Mossy Lantern
mossy_lantern.description: Low rafters, a fire that's been burning for twenty years, and a barkeep who doesn't ask where you've been. The common room smells of pine resin and old ale.

brindlewood_square.name: Brindlewood
brindlewood_square.description: The village square is cobblestone and mud in equal measure. A well sits at the center, its rope frayed. Houses ring the edge like quiet watchers.

eldergrove_edge.name: Edge of the Eldergrove
eldergrove_edge.description: The trees here are older than the village name. The canopy closes fast. You can hear something moving just past where the light reaches.

room_three.name: Room Three
room_three.description: A small room above the common room. Straw mattress, a window facing the Eldergrove, enough floor space to work with. The floorboards creak but they hold.

eldergrove_deep.name: The Deep Eldergrove
eldergrove_deep.description: The canopy closes completely here. The light that reaches the ground is green and old. The undergrowth is thicker, stranger. Silverberries deeper in are larger, their color almost luminous.
